Una storia vera è quella dell’arresto e della prigionia nella torre di Cosimo il Vecchio Medici: era il cittadino più ricco di Firenze grazie alla sua fortunata attività bancaria. E  ... title: Cosimo de' Medici: Netflix Vs Real Life | Tuscany Now & More
highlights: “il Vecchio”) is the founder of Renaissance Florence; a statesman, banker, Humanist and Florentine patriot. Strictly speaking, he was a private citizen like others  ...    There was a long-running power struggle between Cosimo and Rinaldo degli Albizzi; the beef certainly was personal, political and loaded with old vs. new money resentment. Cosimo was imprisoned and in 1433, exiled (initially to Padua). Albizzi did plan a coup in his absence, and was banished, but not murdered. In fact, he lived to his seventies.
